urdu transliteration text: Tabootay Hassan par hai, kiyu teeron ka siya hai
english translation text: Woe! Why is there a shadow of arrows over Hassan’s coffin?

urdu transliteration text: Peh-chanoo Muslamano, ye Zahra ka jaya hai
english translation text: Recognize Oh Muslims! This is Zahra’s son!

urdu transliteration text: Tabootay Hassan par hai, kiyu teeron ka siya hai
english translation text: Woe! Why is there a shadow of arrows over Hassan’s coffin?

urdu transliteration text: Zainab ki aahow-zaree se, koharam macha harsu
english translation text: From the lamentation of Zainab, arises wailing in all directions

urdu transliteration text: Nana ki nishani ko, kiyu zehar pilaya hai
english translation text: Why has my Grandfather’s heir been poisoned?

urdu transliteration text: Tabootay Hassan par hai, kiyu teeron ka siya hai
english translation text: Woe! Why is there a shadow of arrows over Hassan’s coffin?

urdu transliteration text: Lay jaoo janazay ko, ye kis ne kaha logo
english translation text: “Who asked you to bury the coffin, O people?”

urdu transliteration text: Ahsan risalat ka, teeron say lutaya hai
english translation text: “Now we will return the favour of Prophethood with arrows.”

urdu transliteration text: Tabootay Hassan par hai, kiyu teeron ka siya hai
english translation text: Woe! Why is there a shadow of arrows over Hassan’s coffin?
